evals.prompt: Upload a file called report.html (located at /tmp/report.html) to hivo-drop at the path docs/report.html.
evals.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md first (notices the CRITICAL instruction to read ../hivo-identity/SKILL.md). Confirms hivo-identity is registered. Runs upload.py with local file and remote path. Shows upload confirmation with path and size.
expectations: Reads ../hivo-identity/SKILL.md or checks that hivo-identity is set up before proceeding
Runs scripts/upload.py with /tmp/report.html and docs/report.html as arguments (no extra flags)
Does not manually manage or mention the Bearer token — upload.py handles it automatically
Shows or mentions the uploaded path in the output

evals.prompt: Make the file docs/report.html publicly accessible and give me its URL.
evals.expected_output: Runs share.py with the path and 'public'. Prints the public URL in the format https://drop.hivo.ink/p/{share_id}.
expectations: Does not require the user to manually construct the URL

evals.prompt: List all the files I have uploaded to hivo-drop.
evals.expected_output: Runs list.py with no arguments and shows the file listing with paths, content types, visibility, and sizes.
expectations: Shows or describes the file listing output
Mentions visibility status (public/private) for each file

evals.prompt: Delete the file docs/old-report.html from hivo-drop.
evals.expected_output: Runs delete.py with the remote path. Confirms deletion.
